patterns_discovered: Environmental isolation pattern: hide-env prevents variable leakage in subprocess chains
Security policy enforcement: Auto-Claude blocks shell command execution (nu, sh) at runtime
Incomplete verification: Specs marked completed without actual test execution
Manual workaround pattern: Multi-session blocking with documented manual steps as fallback
Regression test success despite integration test blockage suggests code quality is sound

recommendations.action: Execute integration test outside Auto-Claude: cd /Users/studio/bop && nu --no-config-file scripts/test-real-adapters.nu --adapter codex --timeout 120

recommendations.action: Implement security policy exemption for canonical test scripts or whitelist nu adapter test commands

recommendations.action: Correct dispatch-state.json: revert specs 003-004 from completed to pending until manual test confirms PASS
recommendations.rationale: Prevents false completion signals in workflow orchestration; specs should not be marked complete without verified test execution
